label: Transparent sea otter motif source
workflow: Built-in image_gen generation on a flat #ff00ff chroma-key background, copied into the workspace, then converted to RGBA with local chroma-key removal.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for catalog asset `motif.png`
Primary request: Create only a sea otter motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no text.
Subject: A playful sea otter with rich dark brown wet fur, cream face and muzzle, small rounded ears, visible whiskers, and a gentle learning-system personality. Include one simple kelp-green frond loosely tucked beside the otter so the motif carries the kelp forest context, but keep it as part of the isolated cutout rather than a scene.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the body, tail, paws, face, whiskers, or kelp frond. The otter may float in a relaxed curved pose with paws near the chest.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves brown fur texture, cream facial highlights, wet-fur sheen, and calm playful expression. Use a crisp silhouette with controlled fur edges and no flyaway hairs so background removal is clean.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props other than the single kelp frond, no ocean background, no bubbles, no decorative background, no second animal, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for `design-system-light.png`
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sea Otter", derived from the visible sea otter cutout with brown wet fur, cream face, whiskers, and kelp frond.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the sea otter fur texture, cream muzzle, dark wet guard hairs, kelp forest frond, whisker lines, paw shapes, and playful learning-system mood. The board must visibly respect motif colors and be suitable for coding a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 design board, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels and UI labels; avoid dense tiny text; crisp product-design mockup with clear component states.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Otter, Sea Otter, Light Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Learning Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance for a playful learning product.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, progress bars, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, student activity chart, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, tooltip, dropdown menu, stepper, slider, calendar/date input, file upload, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow samples, texture swatches, motif asset preview.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, warm cream learning surfaces, wet-fur line texture, kelp-ribbon dividers, rounded playful controls that remain professional and scannable.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: Otter Cream #F3E5C9, Wet Fur Ink #1B130E, Kelp Olive #7A741F, Deep Kelp #3E4A22, Otter Brown #6B3F24, Slick Auburn #A46B3D, Tide Teal #2F7D83, Shell Mist #F8F4EA, Whisker Taupe #CBB79A, Dark Current #122326.
Charts: include clear learning analytics charts using Otter Brown, Kelp Olive, Tide Teal, Slick Auburn, and Cream highlight.
Text: use short readable UI labels only, such as Lessons, Progress, Skills, Cohort, Review, Quiz, Active, Complete, Draft, Retry.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note brown-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Otter", no ocean photo background, no illegible token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for `design-system-dark.png`
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible "Morphous Sea Otter" design-system board. It must feel like the same sea otter learning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible sea otter motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Sea Otter board as references. Preserve the brown wet fur, cream face, kelp olive, tide teal, whisker-line texture, rounded learning controls, dashboard/data structure, component coverage, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn token roles. The board must be suitable for coding a dark shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Canvas: exact 3840x2160 wide 16:9 design board, high-resolution source asset.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels and UI labels; avoid dense tiny text; crisp product-design mockup with clear component states.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Otter, Sea Otter, Dark Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Learning Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, progress bars, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, student activity chart, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, tooltip, dropdown menu, stepper, slider, calendar/date input, file upload, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow samples, texture swatches, motif asset preview.
Visual details: dark background derived from Wet Fur Ink #1B130E and Dark Current #122326, card surfaces like deep wet fur and kelp shadow, readable text from Otter Cream #F3E5C9 and Shell Mist #F8F4EA, primary actions from Kelp Olive and warm Otter Brown, analytics accents from Tide Teal and Slick Auburn. Use subtle wet-fur line texture, kelp-ribbon dividers, cream highlight glints, and restrained contrast.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics. Show multilingual product UI guidance for a playful learning product.
Charts: include clear learning analytics charts using Kelp Olive, Tide Teal, Otter Brown, Slick Auburn, and Cream highlight on dark surfaces.
Text: use short readable UI labels only, such as Lessons, Progress, Skills, Cohort, Review, Quiz, Active, Complete, Draft, Retry.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note brown-only palette, no flat pure-black-only background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Otter", no illegible token tables.
